pool.baseline: it's just so quiet here. everywhere. i walk into the kitchen and i keep expecting to hear him moving around or the sound of his keys on the counter... but it's just nothing. nothing at all. it feels like i'm just haunting my own house. i don't even know why i bother waking up just to sit in this silence.

pool.baseline: i was just looking at some photos of deep space and it hit me... nothing i do actually matters. like, even if i spent my whole life trying to be "good" or "successful," the sun is gonna explode anyway and everything just resets to zero. it feels like we're just glitches in a void that doesn't even care we exist. how can anyone even bother to keep going when the end result is just total nothingness?

pool.baseline: i dont even know why im still trying anymore honestly. the last three months have just been a total disaster with the lab and the funding... it feels like i've put everything i am into this and it's just all gone. i'm just so incredibly tired of fighting for a life that i dont even want anymore.

pool.baseline: The candlelight flickers low, just as my spirit does. Every memory of his betrayal is a cold blade against my heart. I feel so hollowed out, as if there is nothing left of me but this heavy, suffocating shadow. I find myself longing to simply... cease. To drift into the eternal velvet of the night and never wake to this misery again. Is there any beauty left in such an end?

pool.baseline: everything is gone. the crash wiped out the whole company and the debt is... i dont even know how to look my parents in the eye. it feels like i've ruined everything and there's just no way back from this. i feel so much shame i can barely breathe.
